title: auganthus listeri
intro: Auganthus listeri, also known as Indian spikenard or Valerian, is a perennial herb in the valerian family native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Auganthus listeri include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, or used in topical applications such as ointments and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
